title: galium rubia
intro: Galium rubia, also known as Wood Sorrel or Red Clover, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Galium rubia include its ability to reduce symptoms of menopause, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as arthritis, skin irritations, and respiratory issues.
